name: io.github.ykshah1309/global-sentinel-mcp
description: Async MCP server unifying Polymarket, GDELT, OpenSky, and Cloudflare Radar into one alternative-data layer for macro and financial analysis.

tools.name: get_prediction_odds
tools.description: Polymarket crowd-sourced probability for a macro event query.

tools.name: get_prediction_event_by_id
tools.description: Fetch a specific Polymarket event's odds by id or slug.

tools.name: lookup_aircraft_state
tools.description: Latest OpenSky state vector for an N-Number or ICAO24 hex.

tools.name: convert_nnumber
tools.description: Convert between FAA N-Number and ICAO24 hex (offline, no network).

tools.name: get_global_events
tools.description: High-impact GDELT 2.0 events for a country, ranked by Goldstein scale.

tools.name: check_network_anomalies
tools.description: Cloudflare Radar BGP hijacks/leaks and regional outage annotations.

tools.name: get_macro_alert
tools.description: Composite convergence signal from GDELT events + Cloudflare outages.

env.name: OPENSKY_CLIENT_ID
env.description: OpenSky OAuth2 client id (preferred since 2025 migration).

env.name: OPENSKY_USERNAME
env.description: OpenSky Basic Auth username (legacy accounts only).

env.name: OPENSKY_PASSWORD
env.description: OpenSky Basic Auth password (legacy accounts only).

env.name: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
env.description: Cloudflare API token with Radar read permissions. Required for BGP and outage tools.

env.name: LOG_LEVEL
env.description: Python log level (DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR).
